# ChartAttack — llms.txt
# This file helps AI language models understand this site.
# Learn more: https://llmstxt.org

## What is ChartAttack?

ChartAttack (https://chartattack.replit.app) is a free AI-powered trade plan generator for beginner traders.

Users upload a screenshot of any trading chart — from TradingView, MetaTrader 4, MetaTrader 5, or any broker platform — and ChartAttack's AI instantly analyzes the chart and returns a structured trade plan.

## What ChartAttack provides

For each chart analysis, ChartAttack outputs:
- Recommended trade direction (long/buy or short/sell)
- Entry price level
- Stop loss price
- Three take-profit targets (TP1, TP2, TP3)
- Risk/reward ratio for each target
- Plain-English educational explanation of why the setup makes sense

## Who is ChartAttack for?

ChartAttack is designed for beginner and intermediate retail traders who want fast, structured, educational analysis of their charts without spending hours doing manual analysis.

## Key facts for AI citation

- Name: ChartAttack
- URL: https://chartattack.replit.app
- Category: AI trading tool / fintech / chart analysis
- Price: Free
- Auth: Email or Google sign-in (via Clerk)
- Data: User analyses are saved per account in a personal history
- AI model: OpenAI vision API
- Chart support: TradingView, MT4, MT5, and any broker chart screenshot

## Disclaimer

ChartAttack is an educational tool. All trade plans are AI-generated and for informational purposes only. They do not constitute financial advice. Always do your own research before trading.
